title: Steven Universe Texture Pack
description: A pack of reskinned elements that represent Steven Universe in my own way.
body: A texture pack that changes several textures to look, well, different. Most items aren't changed, but some like quartz, end portals, and the sun are different. It also contains retextured mobs with Gems, because it's based off of Steven Universe, so why not? There is still more to be added, so check up on this pack every now and then to see what's new. I might even be working on it right now!
